Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Enum Class AccountType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AccountType>
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AccountType>, Constable
public enum AccountType extends Enum<AccountType>
Account type enumeration.
Author:
Craig Cavanaugh

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class java.lang.Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E extends Enum<E>>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    ASSET
    Represents an asset account.
    BANK
    Represents a bank account.
    CASH
    Represents a cash account.
    CHECKING
    Represents a checking account.
    CREDIT
    Represents a credit account, typically a liability.
    CREDITCARD
    Represents a credit card account.
    EQUITY
    Represents an equity account.
    EXPENSE
    Represents an expense account.
    FIXED_ASSET
    Represents a fixed asset account.
    INCOME
    Represents an income account.
    INVEST
    Represents an investment account.
    LIABILITY
    Represents a liability account.
    LONG_TERM_LIABILITY
    Represents a long-term liability account.
    MONEYMKRT
    Represents a money market account.
    MUTUAL
    Represents a mutual fund account.
    ROOT
    Represents the root account in a chart of accounts hierarchy.
    SIMPLEINVEST
    Represents a simple investment account.
    UNKNOWN
    Represents an unknown or unspecified account type.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • ASSET

      public static final AccountType ASSET
      Represents an asset account. Assets are what a company owns.

    • BANK

      public static final AccountType BANK
      Represents a bank account. This is a more specific type of asset account.

    • CASH

      public static final AccountType CASH
      Represents a cash account. This is a specific type of asset account for physical currency.

    • CHECKING

      public static final AccountType CHECKING
      Represents a checking account. This is a specific type of bank account.

    • CREDIT

      public static final AccountType CREDIT
      Represents a credit account, typically a liability.

    • EQUITY

      public static final AccountType EQUITY
      Represents an equity account. Equity is the net worth of a company (Assets - Liabilities).

    • EXPENSE

      public static final AccountType EXPENSE
      Represents an expense account. Expenses are costs incurred in the course of business.

    • INCOME

      public static final AccountType INCOME
      Represents an income account. Income is revenue earned by the company.

    • INVEST

      public static final AccountType INVEST
      Represents an investment account. This is a type of asset account.

    • SIMPLEINVEST

      public static final AccountType SIMPLEINVEST
      Represents a simple investment account.

    • LIABILITY

      public static final AccountType LIABILITY
      Represents a liability account. Liabilities are what a company owes.

    • MONEYMKRT

      public static final AccountType MONEYMKRT
      Represents a money market account. This is a type of bank account.

    • MUTUAL

      public static final AccountType MUTUAL
      Represents a mutual fund account. This is a type of investment account.

    • ROOT

      public static final AccountType ROOT
      Represents the root account in a chart of accounts hierarchy.

    • FIXED_ASSET

      public static final AccountType FIXED_ASSET
      Represents a fixed asset account. Fixed assets are long-term tangible assets.

    • LONG_TERM_LIABILITY

      public static final AccountType LONG_TERM_LIABILITY
      Represents a long-term liability account.

    • CREDITCARD

      public static final AccountType CREDITCARD
      Represents a credit card account. This is a specific type of liability account.

    • UNKNOWN

      public static final AccountType UNKNOWN
      Represents an unknown or unspecified account type. Used as a default for JSON deserialization.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static AccountType[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static AccountType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • fromString

      public static AccountType fromString(String value)
      Creates an AccountType enum from a string value. This method is used by Jackson for JSON deserialization. It attempts to match the input string to an enum constant, case-sensitively. If no match is found, it returns UNKNOWN.
      Parameters:
      value - The string value to convert to an AccountType.
      Returns:
      The corresponding AccountType enum constant, or UNKNOWN if the value is not recognized.

    • toUpperCase

      public String toUpperCase()
      Returns the uppercase string representation of this account type.
      Returns:
      the enum name in uppercase form.
